Name: AiSoundParam
Description: Determines the AI response to a sound. Typically triggered along side the actual sound event.

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: Time for AI sound to remain

Fields.Name: Is Affected by Sound Radius Magnification
Fields.Description: Whether it is affected by the special effect Sound Radius Magnification

Fields.Name: Set Search Target
Fields.Description: If ON, set the search target when sound is heard.

Fields.Name: Forget Time
Fields.Description: Time to forget the sound target (overwrite) [sec]

Fields.Name: Awareness Increase
Fields.Description: Increased search degree for characters within the audible range of AI sounds

Fields.Name: Engagement Level Increase
Fields.Description: Increased engagement of characters within the audible range of AI sounds
